mapper.select: SELECT type_id AS typeId, name, description, category, created_at AS createdAt FROM facility_type ORDER BY type_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO facility_type (name, description, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE facility_type SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE type_id = #{typeId}
mapper.select: SELECT f.facility_id, f.name, ft.name AS facilityName, ft.category FROM facility f JOIN facility_type ft ON f.type_id = ft.type_id WHERE ft.category = '편의시설' AND f.is_active = 1

SELECT f.facility_id AS facilityId, f.type_id AS typeId, f.name, f.description, f.max_capacity AS maxCapacity, f.open_time AS openTime, f.close_time AS closeTime, f.slot_duration AS slotDuration, f.is_active AS isActive, f.price, f.created_at AS createdAt, COUNT(r.reservation_id) AS todayReserved FROM facility f LEFT JOIN facility_type t ON f.type_id = t.type_id LEFT JOIN reservation r ON f.facility_id = r.facility_id AND r.reservation_date = CURDATE() AND r.status != 'CANCELLED' AND r.start_time >= f.open_time AND r.end_time <= f.close_time
f.deleted_at IS NULL
AND f.type_id = #{_parameter}
GROUP BY f.facility_id ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT f.facility_id AS facilityId, f.type_id AS typeId, f.name, f.description, f.max_capacity AS maxCapacity, f.open_time AS openTime, f.close_time AS closeTime, f.slot_duration AS slotDuration, f.is_active AS isActive, f.price, f.created_at AS createdAt, gx.program_id AS programId, gx.start_date AS startDate, gx.end_date AS endDate, gx.days_of_week AS daysOfWeek FROM facility f LEFT JOIN facility_type t ON f.type_id = t.type_id LEFT JOIN gx_program gx ON f.facility_id = gx.facility_id WHERE f.facility_id = #{facilityId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT f.facility_id AS facilityId, f.type_id AS typeId, f.name, f.description, f.max_capacity AS maxCapacity, f.open_time AS openTime, f.close_time AS closeTime, f.slot_duration AS slotDuration, f.is_active AS isActive, f.price, f.created_at AS createdAt FROM facility f LEFT JOIN facility_type t ON f.type_id = t.type_id WHERE f.is_active = 1 AND f.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY f.type_id, f.facility_id

SELECT facility_id AS facilityId, type_id AS typeId, name, description, max_capacity AS maxCapacity, open_time AS openTime, close_time AS closeTime, slot_duration AS slotDuration, is_active AS isActive, price, created_at AS createdAt FROM facility WHERE is_active = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT f.facility_id AS facilityId, f.name AS facilityName, ft.type_id AS typeId, ft.name AS typeName, f.max_capacity AS maxCapacity FROM facility f JOIN facility_type ft ON f.type_id = ft.type_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO facility ( type_id, name, description, max_capacity, open_time, close_time, slot_duration, is_active, price, created_at ) VALUES ( #{typeId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{maxCapacity}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{slotDuration}, #{isActive}, #{price}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE facility SET type_id = #{typeId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, max_capacity = #{maxCapacity}, open_time = #{openTime}, close_time = #{closeTime}, slot_duration = #{slotDuration}, is_active = #{isActive}, price = #{price}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE facility SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId}
